summary: Joel announces the release of FogBugz 7.3, describing it as a significant update despite its incremental version number. The post is a straightforward product announcement listing new features including case editing, bulk email reply, resizable UI, IMAP support, and faster backlog editing. It serves primarily as a marketing update for Fog Creek's bug tracking product.
key_points: FogBugz 7.3 is positioned as a larger release than its version number suggests, with daily-use features
Key additions include case event editing, bulk reply for emails, and IMAP support
Agile/scrum workflow improvements were made with faster project backlog editing
money_quotes: FogBugz 7.3 is a pretty huge release, despite the modest version number.
key_insight: A brief product announcement for FogBugz 7.3 highlighting incremental but practical feature improvements for daily use.
